data.title: Rocket Doctor AI Inc. hires FN Media Group for 3-day news/media campaign starting Oct 20, 2025, for $14,085.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 16, 2025, Rocker Doctor AI Inc. (referred to as the “Company” or “Rocket Doctor AI”) (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) has revealed its partnership with FN Media Group, LLC (“FN Media”) for news and media marketing campaigns. These campaigns are set to run for three (3) days starting the week of October 20, 2025, with a cost of USD$14,085.

data.title: VirnetX (Nasdaq: VHC) secures GSA Schedule contract, becoming tech provider for government agencies.
data.description: In Zephyr Cove, Nevada, VirnetX Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: VHC), a prominent player in secure communications and zero-trust cybersecurity solutions, revealed that it secured a General Services Administration Multiple Award Schedule contract, referred to as the "GSA Schedule." This recognition authorizes VirnetX as a certified technology vendor for various government agencies at the federal, state, and local levels looking to enhance their cybersecurity, communications security, and digital engineering capabilities.

data.title: Trump uses recently enacted tax package to pay ICE agents during shutdown, bypassing Congress.
data.description: Using funds from a newly passed tax package, President Trump has taken action to provide payment to certain federal employees despite Congress not yet agreeing on a spending plan.

data.title: Archer Aviation buys air taxi patents, Cathie Wood sells shares. ACHR stock reacts to the news.
data.description: Archer Aviation, a company specializing in air taxis, has expanded its portfolio by acquiring a significant number of patents. This move comes as Cathie Wood's ARK Invest sells a portion of its shares in the company. Consequently, ACHR stock sees a reversal in its trajectory. This strategic acquisition of air taxi patents marks a pivotal moment for Archer Aviation, showcasing their commitment to innovation and growth in the market. On the other hand, Cathie Wood's decision to divest shares suggests a shift in investment strategies. These recent developments have impacted the stock performance of ACHR, reflecting the dynamics of the market and investor sentiment.

data.title: Charles Schwab and Interactive Brokers stock slide as they approach buy points post record Q3.
data.description: Charles Schwab's stock is currently close to a trendline following the release of its record-breaking Q3 report. At the same time, Interactive Brokers is trading within a buy zone and surpassed expectations. Both companies experienced a decline from their buy points after these results.

data.title: CoreWeave appoints Jon Jones as its first Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) for scaling products and sales.
data.description: Livingston, New Jersey - CoreWeave (Nasdaq: CRWV) revealed the selection of Jon Jones as the inaugural Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). In this role, Jones is set to head the global revenue team of the company, concentrating on expanding products and sales to propel CoreWeave's growth forward. Jones, a distinguished figure in the AI sector, boasts over 20 years of leadership in technology and has a strong track record of steering companies through significant periods of expansion.

data.title: Cactus, Inc. (NYSE: WHD) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 29, hosting conference call on Oct 30 at 9:00am CT.(webcast available)
data.description: Houston-based Cactus, Inc. (NYSE: WHD) revealed plans to disclose its Q3 2025 earnings after markets shut on Wednesday, October 29, 2025. The Company sets to hold a conference call the next day, Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET) to delve into financial and operational outcomes. Interested parties can join the webcast on Cactus’ official website, www.CactusWHD.com. It is advisable to log in at least 10 minutes beforehand.

data.title: CUPE Ontario calls for Labour Minister Piccini to resign over Skills Development Fund scandal. - 106 characters
data.description: In Toronto, the Ford Conservatives are facing allegations of corruption following recent findings by Ontario’s auditor general regarding the government’s Skills Development Fund. CUPE Ontario, the public sector union, is urging accountability from Labour Minister David Piccini, emphasizing the need for a thorough investigation into these scandalous actions. The president of CUPE Ontario, Fred Hahn, stressed the importance of restoring public trust in light of these revelations. This emphasizes the ongoing struggle for transparency and integrity within the government, highlighting the significance of addressing corruption at the highest levels.
Q3 2025 earnings call date revealed by Perimeter - stay tuned for more details.
Helium Evolution achieves milestone with first commercial sales of Helium.

data.title: Collective Metals finds strong surface radioactivity in Rocas Uranium Project during exploration program.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, an announcement was made on October 16, 2025, by COLLECTIVE METALS INC. regarding preliminary findings from its 2025 exploration initiative at the Rocas Uranium Project. The company, also known as Collective, is listed as CSE: COMT, OTC: CLLMF, and FSE: TO1. Rocas is subject to a three-year earn-in arrangement with Standard Uranium Ltd., listed as TSXV:STND. Between September 30th and October 8th, 2025, Collective performed an extensive mapping and sampling campaign over previous uranium manifestations and target areas within the project site. The assessment unveiled various zones exhibiting substantial radioactivity levels.

data.title: SGBX subsidiary, Olenox, completes Phase 1 of wellsite monitoring system, with Phase 2 to launch shareholder dashboard soon.
data.description: The initial phase of a sophisticated wellsite monitoring system has been successfully finished, paving the way for the upcoming launch of Phase 2 which will introduce a real-time shareholder dashboard. Important milestones have been achieved in the development process, with the completion of Phase 1 marking a significant progress towards enhancing operational efficiency and data accessibility. The forthcoming implementation of the real-time dashboard in Phase 2 is expected to provide shareholders with immediate access to crucial wellsite information and insights. This technological advancement underscores the commitment to leveraging cutting-edge solutions in the industry, with a focus on boosting transparency and communication.

data.title: Riot Platforms sets Q3 2025 earnings call for Oct 30 amidst Bitcoin mining growth in data centers, expansion.
data.description: A top Bitcoin mining company, Riot Platforms, has revealed plans for its Q3 2025 earnings call set to take place on October 30, 2025. The company, known for its prominent position in the industry, is actively expanding its presence in data centers and mining operations. This development highlights Riot Platforms' ongoing growth strategy and commitment to advancing its operations. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly awaiting the financial results and insights that will be shared during the upcoming earnings call.

data.title: TC Energy will host a conference call on Nov. 6, 2025 to discuss Q3 financial results, financial outlook, and other updates. Includes an update on the Company's financial outlook.
data.description: TC Energy Corporation, a leading energy company, based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced that they will be hosting a teleconference and webcast on November 6, 2025. This event will primarily focus on discussing the financial results for the third quarter of the year. TC Energy, listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol TRP, will provide insights into its financial outlook for the coming months as well as share any recent significant developments. This information will be crucial for investors and stakeholders to gain a better understanding of the company's performance and future prospects.
